passive.name: Time In A Bottle
passive.description: Zilean stores time as Experience and can grant it to his allies. When he has enough Experience to finish an ally's level up, he can right-click them to impart it. Zilean receives as much Experience as he gives.

Q.name: Time Bomb
Q.description: Tosses a bomb to target area that sticks to units that come near it (prioritizes Champions). It detonates after 3 seconds, dealing area of effect damage. If a Time Bomb is detonated early by another Time Bomb, it also stuns enemies.
Q.tooltip:
Zilean tosses a time-delayed bomb that sticks to the first unit which comes within a small area around it. After {{ e2 }} seconds it detonates, dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.

Placing a second bomb on a unit that already has one detonates the first bomb immediately and Stuns enemies in the blast for {{ e4 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zilean}} throws a ticking time bomb to the target location that will attach upon enemy contact, {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them. It will detonate after a short time or when the attached unit dies, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The bomb will detonate immediately if another bomb attaches to the same target, briefly {{tip|stun|stunning}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zilean''' throws a ticking time bomb to the target location that grants {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. The bomb will attach itself to units that move within the epicenter, or those hit directly, {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them.
wiki_detail.description2: After 3 seconds, or when the attached unit dies, the bomb explodes to deal {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description3: The bomb detonates immediately if another bomb attaches itself to the same unit, {{tip|stun|stunning}} nearby enemies for a duration.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Time Bombs'' landing directly on top of multiple units follow a priority order for whom to attach themselves to.
*# Units already carrying a bomb
*# Enemy champions
*# Allied champions
*# Enemy minions
*# Allied minions
* ''Time Bombs'' are not visible to enemies if they attach to an ally that is {{tip|stealth|stealthed}} and vice versa.
* When ''Time Bomb'' snaps onto an enemy, it  deals 0 {{tip|proc damage}}.
** This triggers [[combat status|in-combat]] effects such as drawing turret aggro and drawing [[Monster#Monster_Behavior|monster aggression]].
** It also triggers {{ri|Sudden Impact}} and applies {{ii|Elixir of Sorcery}}.
** It does not trigger {{ri|Cheap Shot}}, however, as {{tip|proc damage}} doesn't trigger {{ri|Cheap Shot}}.
* '''Zilean''' can detonate an enemy counterpart's ''Time Bomb'' by placing his own on the same unit (the first bomb still deals damage).
* ''Time Bomb'' will be dispelled if the holder takes fatal damage and is saved by {{tip|resurrection}} before it explodes.
* ''Time Bomb'' can deal damage to the enemy holder through {{tip|untargetable|untargetablility}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will prevent the application of ''Time Bomb'' and it's detonation damage as well as block the {{tip|stun}}, but not it's immediate detonation if the target already has a ''Time Bomb'' on them.

W.name: Rewind
W.description: Zilean can prepare himself for future confrontations, reducing the cooldowns of his other basic abilities.
W.tooltip: Zilean turns time, reducing his other basic Ability Cooldowns by {{ e2 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zilean}} {{sti|cdr|reduces}} the {{sti|cd|'''remaining'''}} cooldowns of his other basic abilities.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zilean''' reduces the {{sti|cd|'''remaining'''}} cooldowns of ''{{ai|Time Bomb|Zilean}}'' and ''{{ai|Time Warp|Zilean}}'' by 10 seconds each.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Either {{ai|Time Bomb|Zilean}} or {{ai|Time Warp|Zilean}} must be on cooldown to cast this ability''.

E.name: Time Warp
E.description: Zilean bends time around any unit, decreasing an enemy's Move Speed or increasing an ally's Move Speed for a short time.
E.tooltip: Zilean Slows an enemy champion by {{ e2 }}% or grants an allied champion {{ e2 }}% Move Speed for {{ e1 }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zilean}} applies ''Time Warp'' to the target champion that lasts for a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Time Warp:}} If the target is an ally, they gain {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. If the target is an enemy, they are {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zilean''' applies ''Time Warp'' to the target champion which lasts for {{fd|2.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Time Warp:}} If the target is an ally, they gain {{as|{{sti|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}. If the target is an enemy, they are {{tip|slow|slowed}}.

R.name: Chronoshift
R.description: Zilean places a protective time rune on an allied champion, teleporting the champion back in time if they take lethal damage.
R.tooltip: Zilean grants a protective time rune to an allied champion for {{ rduration }} seconds. If the target would die, the rune rewinds their timeline, putting them into Stasis for {{ revivestateduration }} seconds, then reviving them and restoring {{ rtotalheal }} Health.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zilean}} places a protective time rune on himself or the target allied champion for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the target would die, they enter {{tip|resurrection}} for a short time, becoming {{tip|invulnerable}}, {{tip|untargetable}}, and {{tip|lockout|unable to act}}. They are {{tip|heal|healed}} afterwards.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zilean''' places a protective time rune on the target allied {{tip|champion}} or himself for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: If the target takes {{tip|death|fatal damage}} within the duration, they enter {{tip|resurrection}} for 3 seconds, becoming {{tip|invulnerable}}, {{tip|untargetable}}, and {{tip|lockout|unable to act}}. Afterwards, they revive while being {{tip|heal|healed}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Upon trigger, ''Chronoshift'' places all [[summoner spell]]s that are not already on cooldown on a 3-second {{sti|cooldown}}.
* ''Chronoshift's'' {{tip|untargetability}} does not {{tip|homing projectile destruction|destroy}} in-flight {{tip|projectiles}}.
* ''Chronoshift'' cannot target {{tip|clone|clones}}.
* ''Chronoshift'' takes priority over all other {{tip|resurrection}} effects as well as all {{tip|zombie state}} effects.
* ''Chronoshift'' does not activate if the target is killed by the {{tip|Nexus Obelisk}}.
* While in resurrection, the target's [[health regeneration]] is set to 0.
* The target's screen will have a white tint.
* The following table refers for interactions while the target is unable to act:
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false,false,false|interrupts=death}}
